sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement system documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Backward Walking (Japanese Version)
special_mechanics.description: In the Japanese version, holding Select while moving causes the character to walk backwards. Character still shoots in the direction facing.

special_mechanics.name: Grenade Throwing
special_mechanics.description: Player can throw grenades vertically towards top of screen regardless of facing direction. Grenades can clear obstacles and kill multiple enemies.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. No specific movement physics values documented in available sources. Game is an overhead run-and-gun action title with no documented jump mechanics, gravity, or sub-pixel system. Primary documentation covers gameplay systems, hidden features, and regional differences rather than movement parameters.
